name.description: A unique identifier for this evaluation sample.

description.description: A human-readable description of what this sample tests.

promptText.description: The user input prompt that is sent to the LLM.

target.description: The expected outcome or grading criteria for the model's generated output. Used by the LLM-as-a-judge scorer. If omitted, defaults to the value of `description`.

catalog.description: Path to the catalog json file. Corresponds to the catalog file path loaded into the A2uiSchemaManager. If omitted, the default is loaded from eval/datasets/defaults.py.

role_description.description: Corresponds to the `role_description` parameter of `A2uiSchemaManager.generate_system_prompt()`. If omitted, the default is loaded from eval/datasets/defaults.py.

workflow_description.description: Corresponds to the `workflow_description` parameter of `A2uiSchemaManager.generate_system_prompt()`. If omitted, the default is loaded from eval/datasets/defaults.py.
